data.what-is-primitivekit#What is PrimitiveKi:
PrimitiveKit is a flexible, accessible component library designed for modern web development. It provides:
38 Production-Ready Components - Everything from basic buttons to complex data tables 600+ Design Tokens - Comprehensive design system following industry standards Zero Hardcoded Values - Complete customization via CSS variables Multi-Framework Support - Works with React, Vue, Svelte, Angular, and HTML/CSS Full Accessibility - WCAG 2.1 AA compliant with keyboard navigation and screen reader support TypeScript First - Complete type safety out of the box

data: PrimitiveKit components are built with accessibility as a core principle, following WCAG 2.1 AA standards.
data.color-contrast#Color Contrast:
All default color combinations meet WCAG 2.1 AA standards:
✅ Text contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 ✅ Large text contrast ratio of at least 3:1 ✅ Interactive element contrast ratio of at least 3:1 Note: When customizing colors, ensure you maintain proper contrast ratios for accessibility.
data.focus-management#Focus Management:
Components handle focus appropriately:
✅ Visible focus indicators on all interactive elements ✅ Focus trap in modals and drawers ✅ Focus restoration when closing overlays ✅ Skip links for navigation
data.keyboard-navigation#Keyboard Navigation:
All interactive components support keyboard navigation:
Key Action Tab Move focus to next interactive element Shift + Tab Move focus to previous interactive element Enter / Space Activate buttons and links Arrow Keys Navigate within components (tabs, menus, etc.) Escape Close modals, dropdowns, and overlays
data.overview#Overview:
Every component in PrimitiveKit is designed to be accessible by default:
✅ Semantic HTML elements ✅ ARIA attributes where needed ✅ Keyboard navigation support ✅ Screen reader compatibility ✅ Focus management ✅ Color contrast compliance

data.testing-accessibility#Testing Accessibil:
We recommend testing your implementation with:
✅ Screen readers (NVDA, JAWS, VoiceOver) ✅ Keyboard-only navigation ✅ Browser accessibility tools (Lighthouse, axe DevTools) ✅ Color contrast checkers Important: While PrimitiveKit components are accessible by default, full WCAG compliance requires proper implementation and testing in your specific application context.

data: PrimitiveKit components are built with zero hardcoded values. Every visual property is customizable via CSS variables.
data.component-specific-variables#Component-S:
Each component has its own set of CSS variables. Check the component documentation for the complete list.
Tip: Use your browser’s DevTools to inspect components and see all available CSS variables.
data.css-variables#CSS Variables: Each component exposes 50-150+ CSS variables that control every aspect of its appearance. You can customize these variables globally or per-component instance.
data.custom-theme#Custom Theme: :root { /* Primary colors */ --btn-primary-bg: rgba(139, 92, 246, 1); --btn-primary-hover: rgba(124, 58, 237, 1); /* Border radius */ --btn-border-radius: 0.75rem; --input-border-radius: 0.75rem; --card-border-radius: 1rem; /* Spacing */ --btn-padding-x: 2rem; --btn-padding-y: 0.75rem; }
data.dark-mode#Dark Mode:
All components support dark mode out of the box. Add the dark class to your root element:
<html class="dark"> <body> <Button>Dark Mode Button</Button> </body> </html> Dark mode uses pure black backgrounds (#000000) and adjusted color values for optimal contrast.
data.minimal-design#Minimal Design: :root { /* Remove shadows */ --btn-shadow: none; --card-shadow: none; /* Minimal borders */ --btn-border-width: 1px; --input-border-width: 1px; /* Square corners */ --btn-border-radius: 0; --input-border-radius: 0; --card-border-radius: 0; }
data.rgba-colors#RGBA Colors:
All colors in PrimitiveKit use RGBA format for better transparency control:
/* Good - RGBA format */ --btn-bg-color: rgba(59, 130, 246, 1); --btn-bg-color-hover: rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.8); /* Avoid - Hex format */ --btn-bg-color: #3b82f6;
